lesson: UHC 16/N54 on an E/M billed with a same-day procedure is usually a missing modifier 25, not missing documentation — run ncci_edit_check before attaching records.
Aetna denies retro-auth requests for 29881 made more than 3 business days after service (AET-SURG-014) — resubmitting unchanged without an auth number never pays.
Cigna CARC 29 reconsiderations fail without clearinghouse acceptance proof (CIG-ADM-081); a cover letter or ledger screenshot is not proof.
